## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`python -m pytest` or equivalent)
- [ ] Generated data validates (outputs have expected columns, types, and ranges)
- [ ] Documentation updated (docstrings, docs/ files, README if needed)
- [ ] No new dependencies added without updating `requirements.txt`
- [ ] Code follows existing style and conventions
